messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: OBSERVE — the rework observatory: compute a rolling QA-bounce/rework rate from existing signals, attributed per role and per ticket-class, against a trailing baseline, and persist it
How it works: The observatory reports the rework rate over the window

messages.author: swarm
